metadata.description: A minimal fork of addyosmani/agent-skills that layers four Batuta skills on top: research-first-dev, notion-kb-workflow, batuta-skill-authoring, batuta-agent-authoring. Inherits 20 upstream engineering skills.

plugins.name: batuta-agent-skills
plugins.description: Batuta fork of agent-skills. 20 upstream skills + 4 Batuta skills: research-first-dev (citation gate for external APIs), notion-kb-workflow (3-mode Notion sync), batuta-skill-authoring (discover-first meta-skill), batuta-agent-authoring (distinctness meta-skill).
